For His blood can wash away each stain.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Though the way seemed straight and narrow,
All I claimed was swept away;
My ambitions, plans, and wishes,
At my feet in ashes lay.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Then God's fire upon the altar
Of my heart was set aflame;
I shall never cease to praise Him,
Glory! glory to His name!

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: Blessed be the name of Jesus!
I'm so glad He took me in;
He's forgiven my transgressions,
He has cleansed my heart from sin.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: What a friend we have in Jesus,
All our sins and griefs to bear!
What a privilege to carry
Everything to God in prayer!
O what peace we often forfeit,
O what needless pain we bear,
All because we do not carry
Everything to God in prayer!

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Have we trials and temptations?
Is there trouble anywhere?
We should never be discouraged,
Take it to the Lord in prayer.
Can we find a friend so faithful,
Who will all our sorrows share?
Jesus knows our every weakness,
Take it to the Lord in prayer.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Are we weak and heavy laden,
Cumbered with a load of care?
Precious Saviour, still our refuge,
Take it to the Lord in prayer.
Do thy friends despise, forsake thee?
Take it to the Lord in prayer;
In His arms He'll take and shield thee,
Thou wilt find a solace there.

title: I AM BOUND FOR THE PROMISED LAND

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: On Jordan's stormy banks I stand,
And cast a wishful eye,
Toward Canaan's fair and happy land,
Where my possessions lie.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: I am bound for the promised land,
I am bound for the promised land;
O who will come and go with me?
I am bound for the promised land.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: O'er all those wide extended plains
Shines one eternal day;
There God the Son forever reigns,
And scatters night away.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: No chilling winds, nor pois'nous breath,
Can reach that healthful shore;
Sickness and sorrow, pain and death,
Are feared and felt no more.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: When shall I reach that happy place,
And be forever blest!
When shall I see my Father's face,
And in His bosom rest?

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: The great Physician now is near,
The sympathizing Jesus,
He speaks the drooping heart to cheer,
Oh, hear the voice of Jesus;

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Sweetest note in seraph song,
Sweetest name on mortal tongue,
Sweetest carol ever sung,
Jesus, blessed Jesus.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Your many sins are all forgiven,
Oh, hear the voice of Jesus;
Go on your way in peace to heaven,
And wear a crown with Jesus.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: All glory to the dying Lamb!
I now believe in Jesus;
I love the blessed Saviour's name,
I love the name of Jesus.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: His name dispels my guilt and fear,
No other name but Jesus;
O how my soul delights to hear
The charming name of Jesus.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: There is coming a day when no heartaches shall come,
No more clouds in the sky, no more tears to dim the eye;
All is peace forevermore on that happy golden shore,
What a day, glorious day that will be.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: What a day that will be when my Jesus I shall see,
And I look upon His face, the One who saved me by His grace;
When He takes me by the Hand, and leads me through the Promised Land,
What a day, glorious day that will be.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: There'll be no sorrow there, no more burdens to bear,
No more sickness, no pain, no more parting over there;
And forever I will be with the One who died for me,
What a day, glorious day that will be.

title: JESUS KEEP ME NEAR THE CROSS

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Jesus, keep me near the cross,
There a precious fountain,
Free to all, a healing stream,
Flows from Calv'ry's mountain.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: In the cross, in the cross,
Be my glory ever;
Till my raptured soul shall find
Rest beyond the river.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Near the cross, a trembling soul,
Love and mercy found me;
There the Bright and Morning Star
Sheds its beams around me.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Near the cross! O Lamb of God,
Bring its scenes before me;
Help me walk from day to day,
With its shadows o'er me.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: Near the cross I'll watch and wait,
Hoping, trusting ever,
Till I reach the golden strand,
Just beyond the river.

title: MY HOPE IS BUILT ON NOTHING LESS

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: My hope is built on nothing less
Than Jesus' blood and righteousness;
I dare not trust the sweetest frame,
But wholly lean on Jesus' name.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: On Christ, the solid Rock, I stand;
All other ground is sinking sand,
All other ground is sinking sand.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: When darkness seems to hide His face,
I rest on His unchanging grace;
In every high and stormy gale,
My anchor holds within the veil.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: His oath, His covenant, His blood,
Support me in the whelming flood;
When all around my soul gives way,
He then is all my hope and stay.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: When He shall come with trumpet sound,
Oh, may I then in Him be found;
Dressed in His righteousness alone,
Faultless to stand before the throne.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Pass me not, O gentle Saviour,
Hear my humble cry;
While on others Thou art calling,
Do not pass me by.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Saviour, Saviour,
Hear my humble cry;
While on others Thou art calling,
Do not pass me by.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Let me at Thy throne of mercy
Find a sweet relief;
Kneeling there in deep contrition,
Help my unbelief.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Trusting only in Thy merit,
Would I seek Thy face;
Heal my wounded, broken spirit,
Save me by Thy grace.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: Thou the Spring of all my comfort,
More than life to me,
Whom have I on earth besides Thee?
Whom in heaven but Thee?

title: I'VE WANDERED FAR AWAY FROM GOD

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: I've wandered far away from God,
Now I'm coming home;
The paths of sin too long I've trod,
Lord, I'm coming home.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Coming home, coming home,
Nevermore to roam;
Open wide Thine arms of love,
Lord, I'm coming home.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: I've wasted many precious years,
Now I'm coming home;
I now repent with bitter tears,
Lord, I'm coming home.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: I'm tired of sin and straying, Lord,
Now I'm coming home;
I'll trust Thy love, believe Thy Word,
Lord, I'm coming home.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: My soul is sick, my heart is sore,
Now I'm coming home;
My strength renew, my hope restore,
Lord, I'm coming home.

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: My only hope, my only plea,
Now I'm coming home;
That Jesus died, and died for me,
Lord, I'm coming home.

sections.label: VERSE 6
lines: I need His cleansing blood, I know,
Now I'm coming home;
O wash me whiter than the snow,
Lord, I'm coming home.

title: I WILL MEET YOU IN THE MORNING

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: I will meet you in the morning,
Just inside the Eastern Gate,
Then be ready, faithful pilgrim,
Lest with you it be too late.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: I will meet you, I will meet you
Just inside the Eastern Gate over there;
I will meet you, I will meet you,
I will meet you in the morning over there.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: If you hasten off to glory,
Linger near the Eastern Gate,
For I'm coming in the morning,
So you'll not have long to wait.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Keep your lamps all trimmed and burning,
For the Bridegroom watch and wait;
He'll be with us at the meeting,
Just inside the Eastern Gate.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: O the joys of that glad meeting
With the saints who for us wait,
What a blessed, happy meeting,
Just inside the Eastern Gate.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: God be with you till we meet again!
By His counsels guide, uphold you,
With His sheep securely fold you;
God be with you till we meet again!

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Till we meet! till we meet!
Till we meet at Jesus' feet;
Till we meet! till we meet!
God be with you till we meet again!

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: God be with you till we meet again!
'Neath His wings securely hide you,
Daily manna still provide you;
God be with you till we meet again!

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: God be with you till we meet again!
When life's perils thick confound you,
Put His arms unfailing round you;
God be with you till we meet again!

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: God be with you till we meet again!
Keep love's banner floating o'er you,
Smite death's threat'ning wave before you;
God be with you till we meet again!

title: TAKE THE NAME OF JESUS WITH YOU

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Take the name of Jesus with you,
Child of sorrow and of woe;
It will joy and comfort give you,
Take it, then, where'er you go.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Precious name, O how sweet!
Hope of earth and joy of Heaven;
Precious name, O how sweet!
Hope of earth and joy of Heaven.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Take the name of Jesus ever,
As a shield from every snare;
If temptations round you gather,
Breathe that holy name in prayer.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: O the precious name of Jesus!
How it thrills our souls with joy,
When His loving arms receive us,
And His songs our tongues employ!

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: At the name of Jesus bowing,
Falling prostrate at His feet,
King of kings in Heaven we'll crown Him,
When our journey is complete.

title: ON THAT BRIGHT AND GOLDEN MORNING

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: On that bright and golden morning
When the Son of Man shall come,
And the radiance of His glory we shall see;
When from ev'ry clime and nation
He shall call His people home,
What a gath'ring of the ransomed that will be!

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: What a gath'ring, what a gath'ring,
What a gath'ring of the ransomed in the summer land of love!
What a gath'ring, what a gath'ring,
Of the ransomed in that happy home above.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: When the blest, who sleep in Jesus,
at His bidding shall arise
From the silence of the grave, and from the sea,
And with bodies all celestial they shall meet Him in the skies,
What a gath'ring and rejoicing there will be!

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: When our eyes behold the city, with its many mansions bright,
And its river, calm and restful, flowing free;
When the friends that death hath parted shall in bliss again unite,
What a gath'ring and a greeting there will be!

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: O the King is surely coming, and the time is drawing nigh,
When the blessèd day of promise we shall see;
Then the changing in a moment, in the twinkling of an eye,
And forever in His presence we shall be.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: All glory to God,
He has lifted me up,
He has lifted me up I know,
He stretched out His hand,
And He lifted me up,
And that's why I love him so,
I love Him more and more,
And when I stand upon the other shore,
I'll praise Him more and more.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: My glory and the lifter of my head
My glory and the lifter of my head
For thou O Lord are a shield for me
My glory and the lifter of mine head.
I cried unto the Lord with my voice (3)
And He heard me out of His holy hill.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: The Lord liveth;
And blessed be my Rock
Let the God of my salvation be exalted (2)
Thou hast turned my mourning into dancing for me
Thou hast put off my sack cloth
Thou hast turned my mourning into dancing for me
And girded me with gladness
To the end my glory may sing praises to Thee
And not keep silence
O Lord my God,
I will give thanks unto Thee forever.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Holy Holy Holy Lord God Almighty!
Early in the morning our song shall rise to Thee,
Holy Holy Holy merciful and mighty;
God over all who rules Eternity.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Holy Holy Holy angels adore Thee!
Casting down their bright crowns around the glassy sea,
Thousands and ten thousands worship low before Thee
Which wert and art and evermore shall be!

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Holy Holy Holy though the darkness hide Thee!
Though the eye of sinful man Thy great glory may not see,
Only Thou art Holy there is none beside Thee,
Perfect in Power in Love and Purity!

title: THE ORIGINAL LIFE THE ORIGINAL SEED

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: God's attributes were manifested
To His Bride in this last age,
We have caught the revelation
By the last prophet's message,
And we know who we are
And what we are raised up for,
Praise the Lord, for the Original Life.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: The Original Life, the Original Seed,
The Original Word is what I believe.
The Son of Man is revealed,
The seventh seal is unveiled,
The Original Life, the Original Seed.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: We are the Word made flesh today,
This is what the Scriptures say.
And our names are seen within,
Redeemed and perfect without sin.
Yes, we are anointed and inspired
By our God, Who's the Original Life.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Our eyes of understanding
He has opened up at last.
And sweet victory is ours
Who were chained down in the past.
True Jubilee has sounded
And we have responded
To our God, Who's the Original Life.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: We are called unto adoption,
Full authority and power.
Sleeping saints will wake and join us
For translation in this hour.
Gentiles days soon will be over,
Glory, Hallelujah!
To our God, Who's the Original Life.

title: JESUS YOU'RE THE SWEETEST NAME OF ALL

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Jesus, You're the sweetest name of all,
Jesus, You always hear me when I call,
Jesus, You pick me up each time I fall,
You're the sweetest, the sweetest name of all.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Jesus, how I love to praise Your name
Jesus, You're still the first, the last, the same,
Jesus, You died and took away my shame,
You're the sweetest, sweetest name of all.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Jesus, You're the soon and coming King,
Jesus, we need the love that You can bring,
Jesus we lift our voices and we sing
You're the sweetest, the sweetest, name of all (2)

title: BLESS THE LORD O MY SOUL

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Bless the Lord, O my soul
O my soul,
Worship His holy name,
Sing like never before
O my soul,
I'll worship your holy name.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: The sun comes up, it's a new day dawning
It's time to sing Your song again,
Whatever may pass, and whatever lies before me
Let me be singing when the evening comes.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: You're rich in love, and You're slow to anger
Your name is great, and Your heart is kind,
For all Your goodness I will keep on singing
Ten thousand reasons for my heart to find.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: And on that day when my strength is failing
The end draws near and my time has come,
Still my soul will sing Your praise unending,
Ten thousand years and then for evermore.

title: SING THE WONDROUS LOVE OF JESUS

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Sing the wondrous love of Jesus.
Sing His mercy and his grace;
In the mansions, bright and blessed,
He'll prepare for us a place.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: When we all get to heaven,
What a day of rejoicing that will be!
When we all see Jesus.
We'll sing and shout the victory

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: While we walk the pilgrim pathway.
Clouds will overspread the sky;
But when travelling days are over.
Not a shadow, not a sigh.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Let us then be true and faithful,
Trusting, serving, every day;
Just one glimpse of him in glory
Will the toils of life repay.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: Onward to the prize before us!
Soon His beauty we'll behold,
Soon the pearly gates will open,
We shall tread the streets of gold.

title: LET THE DEW OF HEAVEN FALL

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Let the dew of heaven fall on me,
Blessed Holy Spirit come and take control
Let the dew of heaven fall on me.
Blessed Holy Spirit come and take control;
Let the dew of heaven fall on me.

title: JESUS IS THE JOY OF LIVING

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Jesus is the joy of living
He's the King of life to me;
Unto Him my all I'm giving
His forevermore to be.
I will do what He commands me
Anywhere He leads, I'll go;
Jesus is the joy of living
He's the dearest friend I know.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: I have found a wondrous Saviour,
Jesus Christ, the soul's delight;
Every blessing of His favour
Fills my heart with hope so bright.
I will do what He commands me.
Anywhere He leads, I'll go;
Jesus is the joy of living
He's the dearest friend I know.

title: SEEK YE FIRST THE KINGDOM OF GOD

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Seek ye first the Kingdom of God,
And His righteousness,
And all these things shall be added unto you.
Hallelu-Hallelujah.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Hallelujah, Hallelujah,
Hallelujah, Hallelu-Hallelujah.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Ask and it shall be given unto you,
Seek and you shall find,
Knock and the door shall be opened unto you,
Hallelu-Hallelujah.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Man shall not live by bread alone,
But by every word,
That proceeds from the mouth of God,
Hallelu-Hallelujah.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: The fulness of the Godhead bodily
Dwelleth in my Lord (3)
And we are complete in Him.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Complete, complete, complete in Him,
We are complete in Him (2)

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: It's not by works of righteousness
But by His grace alone (3)
That we are complete in Him.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: There's nothing more that I can do
For Jesus did it all (3)
And we are complete in Him.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Rejoice evermore,
For this is the will of God (3)
In Christ Jesus concerning you.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Pray without ceasing,
For this is the will of God (3)
In Christ Jesus concerning you.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: In everything give thanks
For this is the will of God (3)
In Christ Jesus concerning you.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: Quench not the Spirit,
For this is the will of God (3)
In Christ Jesus concerning you.

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: Prove all things,
Hold fast that which is good (3)
In Christ Jesus concerning you.

sections.label: VERSE 6
lines: Love one another,
For this is the will of God (3)
In Christ Jesus concerning you.

title: WE'VE GOT A GREAT BIG WONDERFUL GOD

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: We've got a great big wonderful God, Hallelujah!
Great big wonderful God,
A God who's always victorious,
Always watching over us,
Great big wonderful God.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: We've got a great big wonderful God, Hallelujah!
Great big wonderful God,
A God who loves every one of us,
Does so much for all of us,
Great big wonderful God.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: He never, never, leaves us,
He's always standing by,
To pick us up if we stumble,
We're the apple of His eye.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: We've got a great big wonderful God, Hallelujah!
Great big wonderful God,
Oh what a glory it is to sing,
Praises to our coming King,
Great, big, wonderful God.

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: We've got a great big wonderful,
Marvellous glorious!.........
We've got a great big wonderful God.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Thou art worthy, thou art worthy,
Thou art worthy, O Lord,
Thou art worthy to receive glory,
Glory and honour and power.
For thou hast created, hast all things created,
Thou hast created all things,
And for Thy pleasure they are created,
For Thou art worthy, O Lord.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Thou art worthy, Thou art worthy,
Thou art worthy, O Lamb,
Thou art worthy to receive glory,
And power at the Father's right hand.
For Thou hast redeemed us, hast ransomed and cleansed us
By Thy blood setting us free;
In white robes arrayed us, kings and priests made us,
And we are reigning in Thee.

title: YOU ARE THE KING OF GLORY

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: You are the King of Glory,
You are the Prince of Peace,
You are the Lord of heaven and earth,
You're the Son of righteousness.
Angels bow down before you,
Worship and adore-for
You have the words of eternal life.
You are Jesus Christ the Lord.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Hosannah to the Son of David!
Hosannah to the King of Kings.
Glory in the highest heaven,
For Jesus the Messiah reigns!

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Into my heart, into my heart,
Come into my heart, Lord Jesus,
Come in today, come in to stay,
Come into my heart, Lord Jesus.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Rule in my heart; rule in my heart;
Be King of my heart, Lord Jesus,
Make this your throne; rule there alone,
Be King of my heart, Lord Jesus.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Out of my life, out of my life,
Shine out of my life Lord Jesus,
Shine out today,
Shine out always,
Shine out of my life, Lord Jesus.

title: LORD WE DESIRE TO SEEK THEE

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Lord we desire to seek Thee,
And in Thy courts to dwell,
To gaze upon Thy beauty,
And to draw from the living well.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: To Thee belongs all glory,
To Thee belongs all praise,
To Thee belongs all majesty,
Both now and through endless days.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: You are the Lily of the Valley,
You are the Morning Star,
You are the Rose of Sharon,
Both now and forever more.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: You are the King of kings,
You are the Lord of lords,
You are the Prince of Peace,
Both now and forever more.

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: You are the Son of God,
You are the Son of Man,
You are the Son of David,
And Jesus is your name.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: The Saviour is waiting to enter your heart.
Why don't you let Him come in?
There's nothing in this world to keep you apart;
What is your answer to Him?

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Time after time He has waited before,
And now He is waiting again,
To see if you're willing to open the door,
Oh, how He wants to come in!

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: If you'll take one step t'wards the Saviour, my friend,
You'll find His arms open wide.
Receive Him and all of your darkness will end,
Within your heart He'll abide.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: I've been redeemed,
By the blood of the Lamb }3
Saved and sanctified I am,
All my sins are washed away,
Praise the Lord.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: And that's not all,
There's more besides. }3
I went to the river
And I got baptized,
All my sins are washed away,
Praise the Lord.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: My Lord and I,
We got so close. }3
He baptized me with the Holy Ghost,
All my sins are washed away,
Praise the Lord.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: He is here, He is here,
He is moving among us.
He is here, He is here,
As we gather in His name.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: He is here, He is here,
And He wants to work a wonder.
He is here, He is here,
As we gather in His name.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: He is Lord, He is Lord,
Let us worship before Him.
He is Lord, He is Lord,
As we gather in His name.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: He is Lord, He is Lord,
Let us praise and adore Him.
Yesterday and today,
And for evermore the same.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Thou dost seek a Bride all pure and holy,
Those who now belong to Thee alone,
Those who give Thee all their heart's affections,
Of Thyself a part, bone of Thy bone.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Lord we answer to Thy heart's deep longing,
Even so come quickly Lord we say,
In our hearts we have the blessed answer,
Rise my love, my fair one come away.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Drawn from every kindred, tribe and nation
By Thy Holy Spirit's mighty power,
Finding rest in Thee, God's great salvation
Waits Thy Bride for Thine appointed hour.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Sharing with Thee in this world's rejection.
Putting on Thy death to gain a crown,
By Thy Blood and Word we're overcomers,
With Thee in Thy throne we shall sit down.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Jesus is the answer for the world today,
Above Him there's no other
For Jesus is the way. (Repeat)

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: If you have any questions in the corners of your mind,
Traces of discouragement,
Peace you cannot find,
Reflections of your past
Seem to face you day by day,
There's one thing I'm sure of:
Jesus is the way.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: I know you've got mountains
That you think you cannot climb,
I know your skies are dark you think
The sun won't shine.
In case you don't know,
But the Word of God is true,
And everything He's promised,
He will do it for you.

title: WE ARE ONE IN THE SPIRIT

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: We are one in the Spirit, we are one in the Lord (2)
And we praise God our unity is now being restored.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: And they'll know we are Christians,
By our love, by our love,
Yes, they'll know we are Christians
By our love.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: We will walk with each other, we will walk hand in hand (2)
And together we'll spread the news
That Christ is in our land.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: We will work with each other, we will work side by side (2)
In this Holy Ghost revival
In God's Spirit we'll abide.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: We are being built together, we are being built in love (2)
And we know that this love is coming down from above.

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: Now the Lord is that Spirit, and the Spirit is the Lord (2)
And He dwells in our spirit and we're all in one accord.

sections.label: VERSE 6
lines: Give all praise to the Father from whom all blessings come
And all praise to Christ Jesus the Father's firstborn Son
And all praise to the Spirit who makes us one.

title: I WILL SING I WILL SING

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: I will sing, I will sing a song unto the Lord. (3)
Alleluia, glory to the Lord.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Allelu, alleluia, glory to the Lord. (3)
Alleluia, glory to the Lord.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: We will come, we will come as one before the Lord. (3)
Alleluia, glory to the Lord.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: If the Son, if the Son shall make you free, (3)
You shall be free indeed.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: They that sow in tears shall reap in joy, (3)
Alleluia, glory to the Lord.

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: Every knee shall bow and every tongue confess, (3)
That Jesus Christ is Lord.

sections.label: VERSE 6
lines: In His name, in His name we have the victory, (3)
Alleluia, glory to the Lord.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Just as I am, without one plea,
But that Thy blood was shed for me.
And that Thou bidst me come to Thee,
O Lamb of God, I come.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Just as I am, and waiting not
To rid my soul of one dark blot,
To Thee, whose blood can cleanse each spot.
O Lamb of God, I come.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Just as I am, though tossed about
With many a conflict, many a doubt,
Fightings and fears within, without,
O Lamb of God, I come.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: Just as I am, poor, wretched, blind,
Sight, riches, healing of the mind,
Yea, all I need, in Thee to find,
O Lamb of God, I come.

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: Just as I am, Thou wilt receive,
Wilt welcome, pardon, cleanse, relieve,
Because Thy promise I believe,
O Lamb of God, I come.

sections.label: VERSE 6
lines: Just as I am, Thy love unknown
Has broken every barrier down,
Now to be Thine, yes, Thine alone,
O Lamb of God, I come.

sections.label: VERSE 7
lines: Just as I am, of that free love
The breadth, length, depth and height to prove,
Here for a season, then above,
O Lamb of God, I come.

title: FAIREST LORD JESUS RULER OF ALL NATURE

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Fairest Lord Jesus, Ruler of all nature,
O Thou of God and man the Son,
Thee will I cherish, Thee will I honour,
Thou my soul's glory, joy and crown.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Beautiful Saviour, Lord of the nations,
Son of God and Son of man,
Glory and honour, praise, adoration,
Now and forever more be Thine.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Fair is the sunshine, fairer still the moonlight,
And all the twinkling starry host,
Jesus shines brighter, Jesus shines purer,
Than all the angels heaven can boast.

title: IN THESE DAYS OF TRIALS SO NEAR THE END

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: In these days of trials so near the end,
When Christ from Glory doth now descend,
Men's hearts are failing and filled with fear,
We know the end time is surely here.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: So just be faithful, believe His word;
Stay with the Message that you have heard;
List' to His prophet, his Message heed;
Walk in the Light where His star doth lead.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: In every church age a star did shine.
To help God's people a Truth to find;
In this last church age a star shines bright.
So friend receive It, walk in the light.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: His Word of promise he gave the Bride,
From his White Charger the prophet cried.
"Yet one more time shall I ride this trail."
THUS SAITH THE LORD can never fail.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want
He makes me down to lie,
In pastures green; He leadeth me
The quiet waters by.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: My soul He doth restore again,
And me to walk doth make,
Within the paths of righteousness,
E'en for His own name's sake.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Yea, though I walk in death's dark vale
Yet will I fear none ill;
For Thou art with me, and Thy rod
And staff me comfort still.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: My table Thou hast furnished
In presence of my foes;
My head Thou dost with oil anoint
And my cup overflows.

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: Goodness and mercy all my life
Shall surely follow me,
And in God's house for evermore
My dwelling place shall be.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: King of my life, I crown Thee now,
Thine shall the glory be
Lest I forget Thy thorn-crowned brow
Lead me to Calvary.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Lest I forget Gethsemane,
Lest I forget Thine agony,
Lest I forget Thy love for me,
Lead me to Calvary.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Show me the tomb where Thou wast laid,
Tenderly mourned and wept,
Angels in robes of light arrayed,
Guarded Thee whilst Thou slept.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Let me, like Mary, through the gloom,
Come with a gift to Thee,
Show to me now the empty tomb,
Lead me to Calvary.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: May I be willing, Lord, to bear
Daily my cross for Thee,
Even Thy cup of grief to share,
Thou hast borne all for me.

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: Fill me, O Lord, with Thy desire
For all who know not Thee,
Then touch my lips with holy fire,
To speak of Calvary.

title: OH WHAT A WONDERFUL WONDERFUL DAY

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Oh, what a wonderful, wonderful day,
Day I will never forget,
After I'd wandered in darkness away,
Jesus my Saviour I met,
Oh, what a tender, compassionate friend,
He met the need of my heart,
Shadows dispelling, with joy I am telling.
He made all the darkness depart!

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Heaven came down and glory filled my soul.
When at the cross the Saviour made me whole
My sins were washed away,
And my night was turned to day.
Heaven came down and glory filled my soul.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Born of the Spirit with life from above,
Into God's family divine,
Justified fully through Calvary's love,
Oh, what a standing is mine!
And the transaction so quickly was made.
When as a sinner I came,
Took of the offer of grace He did proffer.
He saved me, Oh praise His dear name!

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Now I've a hope that will surely endure
After the passing of time,
I have a future in Heaven for sure,
There in those mansions sublime,
And it's because of that wonderful day
When at the cross I believed,
Riches eternal and blessings supernal
From His precious hand I received!

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Out of my bondage, sorrow and night,
Jesus I come, Jesus I come;
Into Thy freedom, gladness and light,
Jesus I come to Thee;
Out of my sickness into Thy health,
Out of my want and into Thy wealth,
Out of my sin and into Thyself,
Jesus I come to Thee.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Out of my shameful failure and loss,
Jesus I come, Jesus I come;
Into the glorious gain of Thy cross,
Jesus I come to Thee;
Out of earth's sorrows into Thy balm,
Out of life's storms and into Thy calm,
Out of distress to jubilant psalm,
Jesus I come to Thee.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Out of unrest and arrogant pride,
Jesus I come, Jesus I come;
Into Thy blessed will to abide,
Jesus I come to Thee;
Out of myself to dwell in Thy love,
Out of despair into raptures above,
Upward for aye on wings like a dove,
Jesus I come to Thee.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: Out of the fear and dread of the tomb,
Jesus I come, Jesus I come;
Into the joy and light of my home,
Jesus I come to Thee;
Out of the depths of ruin untold,
Into the peace of Thy sheltering fold,
Ever Thy glorious face to behold,
Jesus I come to Thee.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: O what a gift! what a wonderful gift!
Who can tell the wonders of the Lord?
Let us open our eyes, our ears, and our hearts,
It is Christ the Lord, it is He!

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: In the stillness of the night,
When the world was asleep,
The Almighty Word leapt out,
He came to Mary, He came to us,
Christ came to the land of Galilee,
Christ our Lord and our King !

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: On the night before He died,
It was Passover night,
And He gathered His friends together,
He broke the bread, He blessed the wine,
It was the gift of His love and His life,
Christ our Lord and our King !

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: On the hill of Calvary,
The world held its breath,
For there for the world to see,
God gave His Son, His very own Son,
For the love of you and me,
Christ our Lord and our King !

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: Early on that morning,
When the guards were sleeping,
Back to life came He!
He conquered death, He conquered sin,
But the vict'ry He gave to you and me !
Christ our Lord and our King !

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: Some day with the saints,
We will come before our Father,
And then we will shout and dance and sing,
For in our midst for our eyes to see,
Will be Christ our Lord and our King!
Christ our Lord and our King !

title: O THE DEEP DEEP LOVE OF JESUS

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: O the deep, deep love of Jesus,
Vast, unmeasured, boundless, free!
Rolling as a mighty ocean
In its fulness over me.
Underneath me, all around me;
Is the current of Thy love;
Leading onward, leading homeward,
To my glorious rest above.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: O the deep, deep love of Jesus,
Spread His praise from shore to shore,
How He loveth, ever loveth,
Changeth never, never more,
How He watches o'er His loved ones,
Died to call them all His own,
How for them He intercedeth,
Watcheth o'er them from the throne.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: O the deep, deep love of Jesus,
Love of every love the best,
'Tis an ocean vast of blessing,
'Tis a haven sweet of rest,
O the deep, deep love of Jesus,
'Tis a heaven of heavens to me,
And it lifts me up to glory,
For it lifts me up to Thee.

title: O LORD ALL THE WORLD BELONGS TO YOU

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: O Lord, all the world belongs to you,
And you are always making all things new,
What is wrong you forgive, and the new life you give,
Is what's turning the world upside down.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: The world's only loving to its friends,
But your way of loving never ends,
Loving enemies too and this loving with you,
Is what's turning the world upside down.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: This world lives divided and apart,
You draw men together and we start,
In your body to see that in fellowship we,
Can be turning the world upside down.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: The world wants the wealth to live in state,
But you show a new way to be great,
Like a servant you came and if we do the same,
We'll be turning the world upside down.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: O Lord, all the world belongs to you,
And you are always making all things new,
Send your Spirit on all in your Church whom you call
To be turning the world upside down.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: To God be the glory, great things He hath done,
So loved He the world that He gave us His Son,
Who yielded His life an atonement for sin,
And opened the life-gate that all may go in.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
Let the earth hear His voice,
Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
Let the people rejoice!
O come to the Father through Jesus the Son,
And give Him the glory, great things He hath done.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: O perfect redemption, the purchase of blood,
To every believer the promise of God;
The vilest offender who truly believes,
That moment from Jesus a pardon receives.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Great things He hath taught us, great things He hath done.
And great our rejoicing through Jesus the Son,
But purer, and higher, and greater will be,
Our wonder, our transport when Jesus we see.

title: I LOVE THE NAME OF JESUS

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: I love the name of Jesus, King of my heart,
He is everything to me,
I bless the name of Jesus, reign in my life,
Show the Father's love so free.
Spirit of Love, Spirit of Power,
Shine through eternity,
I praise the name of Jesus, Light of the world,
Let me walk each day with Thee.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: I love the name of Jesus, risen above,
And He loves and prays for me,
I bless the name of Jesus, ruling on high,
With a glorious majesty.
Spirit of Love, Spirit of Power,
Shine through eternity.
I praise the name of Jesus, Lord of my life,
For He died to set me free.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: I love the name of Jesus, Splendour of God,
And His face I long to see,
I bless the name of Jesus, Shepherd of men,
By His side I now can be.
Spirit of Love, Spirit of Power,
Shine through eternity.
I praise the name of Jesus, for He is Love,
And that Love He gives to me.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Shepherd of love, you knew I had lost my way,
Shepherd of love, you cared that I'd gone astray.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: You sought and found me,
Placed around me,
Strong arms that carried me home,
No foe can harm me, nor alarm me,
Never again will I roam.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Shepherd of love, Saviour and Lord and Guide,
Shepherd of love, forever I'll stay by your side.

title: MAKE ME A CHANNEL OF YOUR PEACE

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Make me a channel of your peace,
Where there is hatred let me bring your love,
Where there is injury your pardon, Lord,
And where there's doubt, true faith in you.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Oh, Master, grant that I may never seek,
So much to be consoled as to console,
To be understood as to understand,
To be loved, as to love with all my soul.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Make me a channel of your peace,
Where there's despair in life let me bring hope,
Where there is darkness, only light
And where there's sadness, ever joy.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Make me a channel of your peace,
It is in pardoning that we are pardoned,
In giving to all men that we receive,
And in dying that we're born to Eternal Life.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: It only takes a spark to get a fire going,
And soon all those around can warm up in its glowing,
That's how it is with God's love,
Once you've experienced it,
You spread His love to everyone,
You want to pass it on !

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: What a wondrous time is spring, when all the trees are budding,
The birds begin to sing, the flowers start their blooming.
That's how it is with God's love,
Once you've experienced it,
You want to sing-it's fresh like spring,
You want to pass it on !

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: I wish for you my friend, this happiness that I've found,
You can depend on Him, it matters not where you're bound.
I'll shout it from the mountain top,
I want the world to know.
The Lord of love has come to me,
I want to pass it on !
(Repeat from 'I'll shout it......')

title: I WILL GIVE THANKS TO THEE

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: I will give thanks to Thee, O Lord, among the people;
I will sing praises to Thee among the nations.
For Thy steadfast love is great, is great to the heavens,
And Thy faithfulness, Thy faithfulness, to the clouds.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Be exalted, O God, above the heavens !
Let Thy glory be over all the earth !
Be exalted, O God, above the heavens !
Let Thy glory be over all the earth !

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Making melody in your heart (3)
Unto the King of kings.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Worship and adore Him,
Worship and adore Him,
Making melody in your heart,
Unto the King of kings.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: King of kings and Lord of lords (3)
Glorify His name.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Love & serve Him from your heart (3)
Praise His lovely name.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: Joy in Him eternally (3)
And bless His Holy Name.

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: Shout His praises everywhere (3)
The King is coming soon.

sections.label: VERSE 6
lines: Clap your hands unto the Lord (3)
Rejoice forever more.

sections.label: VERSE 7
lines: Love Him, love Him, more and more (3)
And dance before His throne.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Clap your hands together } 2
And praise the Lord,
Join together and sing,
Joy to the whole world bring;
Clap your hands together,
And praise the Lord.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Lift your hands together } 2
And praise the Lord,
Look into His face,
See His wondrous Grace,
Lift your hands together,
And praise the Lord.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Join your hands together } 2
And praise the Lord,
Stand in unity,
Shout out we are free,
Join your hands together,
And praise the Lord.

title: LET THE LORD HAVE HIS WAY

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Let the Lord have His way
In your life every day;
There's no peace, there's no rest
Till the Lord has His way;
Put your life in His hands,
Rest secure in His plans,
Let the Lord, let the Lord have His way

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: It shall flow like a river,
It shall fall like the rain,
It shall come as the dawning of the day,
For the knowledge of the Lord;
Shall fill all the earth,
And the Spirit of the Lord shall fall.

title: OH THIS IS LIKE HEAVEN TO ME

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: We find many people who can't understand
Why we are so happy and free.
We've crossed over Jordan to Canaan's fair land,
And this is like Heaven to me.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Oh, this is like Heaven to me,
Yes, this is like Heaven to me;
I've crossed over Jordan to Canaan's fair land,
And this is like Heaven to me.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: So when we are happy we sing and we shout;
Some don't understand us, I see.
We're filled with the Spirit, there isn't a doubt,
And this is like Heaven to me.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: We've heard the sweet music, the heavenly chord,
From glory land over the sea;
A soul-thrilling message from Jesus, our Lord,
And this is like Heaven to me.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: We're looking for Jesus with glory to come;
'Tis Jesus Who died on the tree.
A cloud of bright angels to carry me home-
Oh, that will be Heaven to me.

sections.label: CHORUS 2
lines: Oh, that will be Heaven to me,
Yes, that will be Heaven to me;
A cloud of bright angels to carry me home-
Yes, that will be Heaven to me

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: When upon life's billows
You are tempest tossed,
When you are discouraged,
Thinking all is lost,
Count your many blessings,
Name them one by one,
And it will surprise you
What the Lord hath done.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Count your blessings,
Name them one by one;
Count your blessings,
See what God hath done;
Count your blessings,
Name them one by one;
Count your many blessings,
See what God hath done.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Are you ever burdened
With a load of care?
Does the cross seem heavy
You are called to bear?
Count your many blessings,
Every doubt will fly,
And you will be singing
As the days go by.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: When you look at others
With their lands and gold,
Think that Christ has promised
You His wealth untold;
Count your many blessings,
Money cannot buy
Your reward in Heaven
Nor your home on high.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: So, amid the conflict,
Whether great or small,
Do not be discouraged,
God is over all;
Count your many blessings
Angels will attend,
Help and comfort give you
To your journey's end.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: I don't know about tomorrow,
I just live from day to day,
I don't borrow from its sunshine;
For its skies may turn to grey.
I don't worry about the future,
For I know what Jesus said,
And today He walks beside me,
And I know what lies ahead.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Many things about tomorrow
I don't seem to understand
But I know who holds tomorrow
And I know who holds my hand.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: I don't know about tomorrow,
It may bring me poverty,
But the one who feeds the sparrow,
Is the one who stands by me,
And the path that be my portion,
Maybe through the flame or flood,
But His presence goes before me,
And I'm covered with His blood.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Every step is getting brighter,
As the golden stairs I climb,
Every burden's getting lighter,
Every cloud is silver lined,
There the sun is always shining,
There no tear will dim the eye,
At the ending of the rainbow,
Where the mountains touch the sky.

title: IT'S THE HOLY GHOST AND FIRE

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: It's the Holy Ghost and fire that is
Keeping me alive (3)
It's the Holy Ghost and fire that is
Keeping me alive,
Jesus is keeping me alive.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Alleluia (3)
Alleluia, Alleluia
Praise the Lord. } 2

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: He is all over me and He's
Keeping me alive (3)
He is all over me and He's
Keeping me alive
Jesus is keeping me alive.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: I have been baptized in the water
In the name of the Lord (3)
I have been baptized in the water
In the name of the Lord,
In the name of the Saviour Jesus Christ.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: I have been baptized in the Spirit
In the name of the Lord (3)
I have been baptized in the Spirit
In the name of the Lord
In the name of the Saviour Jesus Christ.

title: I'M PRESSING ON THE UPWARD WAY

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: I'm pressing on the upward way,
New heights I'm gaining every day,
Still praying as I'm onward bound,
Lord, plant my feet on higher ground.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Lord lift me up and let me stand,
By faith on heaven's tableland;
A higher plane than I have found,
Lord, plant my feet on higher ground.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: My heart has no desire to stay,
Where doubts arise and fears dismay,
Tho' some may dwell where these abound
My prayer, my aim is higher ground.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: I want to live above the world,
Tho' Satan's darts at me are hurled
For faith has caught the joyful sound
The song of saints on higher ground.

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: I want to scale the utmost height,
And catch a gleam of glory bright,
But still I'll pray till heaven I've found.
Lord, lead me on to higher ground.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Oh Lord our God
You are a great God,
Your majesty beyond compare
Who is a God like unto you,
And who like me,
Would know Your care.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: It's good dear Lord to know
Your greatness,
It's good dear Lord to know
Your care,
It's good just to be,
In Your presence,
It's good just to know that
You are there.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: O glorious victory
That day He set me free,
And made my heart His very throne,
My life is no longer mine,
I'm a prisoner of love divine
And now I live to praise His name.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Who I am, Lord, who I am,
I can see now, who I am,
A part of my Saviour
A part of His Word,
It's a revelation
(It's predestination)
Of who I am.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: On Calvary He died
To redeem His lost Bride
The King of kings
Became my Saviour,
This is God's great mystery,
Of love expressed to me,
That Christ and I
Might be made one!

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: All is Well, all is well,
We have heard the Message 'Shalom'
All is well,
There is a place of perfect rest
Behind the Inner Veil,
So rest, Little Bride, rest
For all is well.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: There's a story in the Bible of Elisha,
Shunamite woman and her son,
The woman found favour with God
And He gave her a son.
While working in the field,
The little boy died,
But the woman's faith never failed,
Even in death she testified
That all is well.

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: As the deer panteth for the waters

sections.label: VERSE 5

sections.label: VERSE 3

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: He is Jehovah, God of creation,

sections.label: VERSE 1

lines: Jesus paid it all

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Lord, now indeed I find,

sections.label: VERSE 3

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: And when before the throne,
I stand in Him complete,
"Jesus died my soul to save"

title: BLESSED BE THE FOUNTAIN OF BLOOD

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Blessed be the fountain of blood

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Whiter than the snow (2)
Wash me in the blood of the Lamb
And I shall be whiter than snow.

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Thorny was the crown that He wore

Grievous were the sorrows He bore

Wash me in the blood that He shed
And I shall be whiter than snow.

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Father I have wandered from Thee

Crimson do my sins seem to me,
Water cannot wash them away.
Jesus to that fountain of Thine

Cleanse me by Thy washing divine
And I shall be whiter than snow.

title: WITHOUT HIM I CAN DO NOTHING

sections.label: VERSE 1
lines: Without Him I can do nothing

Without Him I would be drifting

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: But with Him I can do all things
And with Him I cannot fail,

sections.label: VERSE 2
lines: Without Him I would be dying
Without Him I'd be enslaved
Without Him life would be hopeless

sections.label: VERSE 3

His Word my compass and guide,

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: Jesus, my Jesus,

You can't turn Him away

sections.label: VERSE 3

sections.label: VERSE 4

it's recorded in God's Word;

sections.label: VERSE 2

sections.label: VERSE 3

sections.label: VERSE 4

that is higher than I.

that is higher than I.

lines: The Lord is my Shepherd

lines: Stand up! stand up for Jesus!

lines: Stand up! Stand up for Jesus!

sections.label: VERSE 2

sections.label: VERSE 3
lines: Peace! perfect peace! With sorrows surging round?

sections.label: VERSE 4
lines: Peace! perfect peace! With loved ones far away?

sections.label: VERSE 5
lines: Peace! perfect peace! our future all unknown?

sections.label: VERSE 6
lines: Peace! perfect peace! death shadowing us and ours?

sections.label: VERSE 7
